title: Looking for Real Estate Agent at Amrapali Group

jsonLd.title: Looking for Real Estate Agent at Amrapali Group
jsonLd.description:
Amrapali Group has an exciting opening for a Real Estate Agent at our Coimbatore office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Amrapali Group:
Amrapali Group is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Referral bonus program
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Amrapali Group!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
